tool.name: Extract Constraints
tool.description: Extract structural constraints from System A or System B (Phase 2). Constraints are properties that must hold for the system's behavior.

system.description: Which system to extract constraints from (A or B)

constraints.description: List of constraint objects to record

extraction_method.description: How constraints were extracted (manual, literature, derived)

use_sub_agent.description: Whether to spawn a sub-agent for parallel extraction

ai.systemPromptSection:
### extract_constraints
Extract structural constraints from a system. This is Phase 2 of the Collapse Engine workflow.

usageExamples.input: {"session_id": "sess-123", "system": "A", "constraints": [{"name": "Energy Conservation", "category": "conservation_law", "statement": "Total energy is conserved in isolated systems", "formal_expression": "dE/dt = 0", "is_structural": true}], "extraction_method": "literature"}

whenToUse: Documenting constraints for System A or B
Building constraint sets for identity gate comparison
